release_notes: v1.2.1 — Polish from real-world v1.2.0 use. FIXED: aggregate run labels ('Custom (N sets)', 'All Prompts') no longer appear as prompt families in the Trends chart or the Visibility Matrix; the FIRMAN Channel Gaps pane now populates (it had been silently empty); charts render in Inter like the rest of the app. NEW: every table is sortable (click a header for A-Z, again for Z-A) and columns are resizable, with numbers sorting by value (1, 2, 3... never 1, 100, 101, 2); the Brands tab shows each brand's website; and a one-click 'Add Brands' button on Web Intelligence imports every brand website from the Brands tab with duplicates skipped automatically.
